title: LEFT JOIN incorrect when ON clause does not reference right table.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id UInt32, name String, age UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE orders (id UInt32, user_id UInt32, amount Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT u.name, o.amount FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = 1 WHERE o.amount > 50;
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN ON clause missing right table reference
